name: Lasagna, Nancy Schwartz
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix 8 ounces sour cream, 16 ounces cottage cheese, and 16 ounces ricotta cheese.
2. Grate 18 ounces mozzarella cheese and 4 ounces cheddar cheese separately.
3. Spread a thin layer of Ragu sauce on the bottom of a 9x13 pan.
4. Layer 3 cooked lasagna noodles, half of the moist cheese mixture, one-third of the dry cheese mixture, and one-third of the sauce in the pan.
5. Repeat steps 1-4 with remaining ingredients.
6. Finish with 3 noodles, the last of the sauce, and the last of the dry cheese.
7. Cover and bake at 350°F for 1.5 hours. Remove cover for the last 15 minutes if desired.
8. Let sit for about 15 minutes before serving.
